summary.lv: Redwire Defense Tech meklē Senior IT Support speciālistu, lai nodrošinātu stabilu un drošu IT vidi kosmosa un aizsardzības tehnoloģiju uzņēmumā Rīgā.
summary.en: Redwire Defense Tech seeks a Senior IT Support Specialist to ensure secure, reliable IT operations at a space and defense technology company in Riga.
